name: Runner Tomato: Hyper Casual
description: Runner Tomato: Hyper Casual – Are you ready to have fun running with a tomato? In this hyper-casual runner game, dash along an endless highway with a single goal ‍: reach the finish line alive! Endless Random Challenges Knives and cash appear completely at random in every run. No two levels are ever the same — every step brings a brand-new surprise!
